name: superagent-cla
description: GitHub App for Contributor License Agreement checks.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @superagent-cla/shared && npm run build -w @superagent-cla/api && npm run build -w @superagent-cla/web
scripts.dev:api: npm run build -w @superagent-cla/shared && npm run dev -w @superagent-cla/api
scripts.dev:web: npm run build -w @superagent-cla/shared && npm run dev -w @superagent-cla/web
scripts.test: npm run build -w @superagent-cla/shared && npm run test -w @superagent-cla/api
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @superagent-cla/shared && npm run typecheck -w @superagent-cla/api && npm run typecheck -w @superagent-cla/web
